title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as luffy’s battle with Chinjao reaches its peak, proving his strength and reshaping Chinjao’s hatred into recognition.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm eventually aiming to capture the complete jailbreak crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll start with you, and then there's the 1000 piece clown, buggy, son of the sea jinbe, sir cro- codile

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: okama King Iwankov ,and Shiliew of the rain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll capture you all and make a real name for myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wonder how IWA-chan is doing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And also the brutal level 6 escapes, who were erased from the world without the public's know- ledge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've discovered where they are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...!! the ones from level 6....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There were others who got out...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ungh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shit ...!! Why can't I hit you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ehh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, GIMME MY HELPMET BACK

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That hurts, you bastard! The ones from earlier too!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: ring-out!!! Jean the bandit is out of the running!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It was a one-hit Ko!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: He was utterly destroyed by a headbuilt from the legendary pirate Don Chinjao!! old age hasn't slowed him down at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmph -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And then there's these guys!!! Not giving us even a moment to breathe with their evenly matched bout!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: kyahhhhhhh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ideo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're in a dead heat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Following in Don Chinjao's Footsteps

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: It's Sai, the 13th leader of the Happou Navy, versus in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The peerless fighter idea! Who dominates at the renowned central fighting club!!
